title: Felipponiella
taxonomy: Felipponiella is a genus of flowering plants in the family Boraginaceae. It consists of two species, which are mainly found in the Mediterranean region. The genus is named after the Italian botanist Felippo Felipponi. Felipponiella species are typically annual or biennial, with small, blue or white flowers. They are often found growing in dry, rocky areas and sandy soils.
